issues.display_title: Issue #3021: Update Hotspot & Banner Step (Add Post) Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Hotspot & Banner Step (Add Post) Layout

Build the Step 2 (Hotspot & Banner) panel of the create-post wizard in pages-new/create per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Hotspot list area (max 5 per post) + Affiliate banner slot (max 1 per post).
  • Empty state (add hotspot / add banner CTAs) and filled state (item rows + remaining count).
  • Available for panorama and multiple post types.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: /create, advance to Step 2.

  1. Layout match — hotspot list + banner slot match the design (empty + filled).
  2. Limits — adding a 5th hotspot disables/hides "add hotspot"; adding a banner disables "add banner" (max 1).
  3. Post type — visible for panorama & multiple; behavior per design for embed (banner only).
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; max-5 hotspot / max-1 banner enforced in UI; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

Hotspot.Banner.Step.Add.Post.mp4

✂️ Update — Hotspot Form (Add/Edit) Layout

Build the hotspot content form (add & edit) for create-post Step 2 per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Fields: Mention (user picker from a list), Title, Description, CTA Text, Link URL.
  • Support the two hotspot types (layout/fields per type as designed).
  • Add and Edit modes; Save / Cancel; field + validation states.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark); visible labels.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 → Add Hotspot (and Edit an existing one).

  1. Layout match — all fields (Mention, Title, Description, CTA Text, Link URL) match the design.
  2. Hotspot types — switching the hotspot type shows the correct fields/layout per type.
  3. States — empty/focus/filled/invalid (e.g. bad URL) and disabled-Save render as designed.
  4. Edit mode — opening an existing hotspot pre-fills the fields.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; all 5 fields + 2 types; add/edit + validation states; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

Hotspot.Form.AddEdit.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #3023: Update Panorama Selection for Hotspot Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Panorama Selection for Hotspot Layout

Build the panorama selection UI for placing hotspots across panoramas in a multi-panorama post, per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • UI to choose which panorama a hotspot belongs to (hotspots can span different panoramas within one post).
  • Thumbnail strip / selector with the active panorama indicated.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 with a multiple post (more than one panorama).

  1. Layout match — the panorama selector matches the design; current selection clearly indicated.
  2. Switch — selecting another panorama updates which panorama the hotspot is assigned to.
  3. Single-panorama — for a single-panorama post, the selector behaves per design (hidden/disabled).
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; panorama selection + active indicator; multi vs single behavior; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

Panorama.Selection.for.Hotspot.mp4

issues.display_title: Issue #3024: Update Banner Affiliate Selector Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Update — Banner Affiliate Selector Layout

Build the affiliate banner selector for create-post Step 2 per the UI/UX design.

Source: docs/brainstorming/12-06-2026/update-create-post/ui-design.md

Scope

  • Select one banner (max 1 per post) from the affiliate list; show the selected banner state + change/remove.
  • Available for panorama & multiple; for embed post types, banner affiliate is the only available feature.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: Step 2 → Add/Select Banner.

  1. Layout match — affiliate list + selected-banner state match the design.
  2. Max 1 — selecting a banner replaces any existing selection (only one allowed); remove clears it.
  3. Embed type — on an embed post, only the banner-affiliate feature is offered (no hotspots).
  4. Empty list — no affiliates available → designed empty state.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; single-banner rule + embed restriction; empty state; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

Banner.Affiliate.Selector.mp4
